stock_market.summary: Markets face heightened caution on April 1, 2026, due to regulatory changes (STT hike, F&O collateral rules) and global uncertainty. Investors are navigating a settlement holiday and cooling reinsurance renewals.

art_market.summary: 2026 art scene favors authenticity and texture. Tactile mixed media and surrealist revivals are rising. Affordable original art market is thriving.
